# @lumiarq/pack-laravel

Framework pack for Laravel projects.

## What it does

- Provides Laravel adapter and pack manifest
- Supplies Laravel-specific generation behavior and templates

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lumiarq/pack-laravel
```

## Contributing

1. Keep generated output compatible with modern Laravel structures.
2. Add tests for manifest, adapter, and template changes.
3. Run `pnpm --filter @lumiarq/pack-laravel test typecheck build`.
